name: hero-01
title: Hero 01 — centered
description: Layout section, ships populated: full-height hero (min-h-svh), centered content stack + background slot. <Hero01 /> renders a complete block; customise by editing the installed copy (copy-and-own).

files.content:
--- /** * Hero-01.astro -- layout section: full-height hero, centered content * stack. Ships populated (frontend-contract.md §7): renders a * complete block with zero props. The demo content below IS the * wireframe -- it shows the composition; make it yours by editing this * copy you own (comment out the content block and replace it). * * `background` slot: absolute layer behind the content for imagery, * vignettes, gradients (effects items drop in here). * * * * */ import { cn } from "../../../lib/utils"; import Badge from "../Badge.astro"; import Button from "../Button.astro"; interface Props { class?: string; [key: string]: unknown; } const { class: className, ...rest } = Astro.props; ---
Introducing sections

Skeletons first, components second.

Every section ships as a working page block. This copy is yours the moment it installs -- edit it, don't configure it.
